policy: Preserve every valuable live URL exactly or provide a one-hop 301 to a genuinely equivalent localized destination. Never redirect removed demo products to the home page.

mustPreserveExactly.blog: All 4 blog archive routes and all 23 current article routes in route-inventory.json
mustPreserveExactly.coreTranslations: All 8 complete core WPML groups in route-inventory.json
mustPreserveExactly.propertyDetails: Keep existing /portfolio/{slug}/ URLs unless a tested 301 map is shipped with the new canonical listing route

conditionalRedirects.condition: Only if the Spanish spelling is corrected in the new canonical IA
conditionalRedirects.reason: The live indexed route contains the Portuguese spelling 'propriedades'

conditionalRedirects.condition: If /bienes-raices/ remains the canonical listing index
conditionalRedirects.reason: The live listing filter submits to /propiedades/, which currently returns 404

conditionalRedirects.condition: If the empty indexed page is retired
conditionalRedirects.reason: Current /properties/ is a 200, self-canonical, empty page

conditionalRedirects.condition: If property discovery is consolidated into one crawlable listing index
conditionalRedirects.reason: Current archive has no server-rendered listing links and relies on 'CARGA MÁS'

conditionalRedirects.condition: Only if detail routes are normalized
conditionalRedirects.reason: Every one of the 11 live detail URLs needs an explicit one-to-one mapping

excludeOrReplaceBeforeIndexing.action: Remove from sitemap and return 410, or 301 only if a truly equivalent page exists
Replace completely with real localized FAQs or remove/410
excludeOrReplaceBeforeIndexing.reason: English theme-demo questions and Lorem Ipsum dated 2021; no FAQPage schema

excludeOrReplaceBeforeIndexing.action: Do not import as business content. Remove from sitemap and 410/noindex unless replaced one-to-one by real products.
excludeOrReplaceBeforeIndexing.reason: Fashion demo catalog, Lorem Ipsum, USD Product/Offer schema

hostCanonicalization.note: Current path takes two hops; collapse to one
